name: memograph
description: Graph-based memory system for LLMs with intelligent retrieval using knowledge graphs, hybrid search, and semantic embeddings
author: Indirakumar

tools.name: search_vault
tools.description: Search memories using semantic or keyword search

tools.name: create_memory
tools.description: Create a new memory in the vault

tools.name: query_with_context
tools.description: Retrieve relevant context for a question

tools.name: get_vault_info
tools.description: Get information about the configured vault

tools.name: get_memory
tools.description: Get full content of a specific memory

tools.name: delete_memory
tools.description: Delete a memory from the vault

tools.name: relate_memories
tools.description: Create a graph link between two memories

tools.name: search_by_graph
tools.description: Traverse connected memories from a starting memory

tools.name: find_path
tools.description: Find the shortest graph path between two memories

tools.name: bulk_create
tools.description: Create multiple memories in one operation

required.name: vault
required.description: Path to your MemoGraph vault directory

examples.title: With Ollama
examples.description: MemoGraph with Ollama for answer generation
